---
title: PyMOL Visualization
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
authors: "Marta Aransay, Carlota de la Concepción, Marta Rodrigo, Lucía Santos"<
date: 10/03/2026
---

# PyMOL

## Protein 1

The **** protein PyMOL figure

![](figure_name.jpg "Protein name") #Juraria

## Protein 2

The *** protein has---

## Protein 3

We choose the *** protein
